name: Earwig Squad
oracleText: Prowl {2}{B} (You may cast this for its prowl cost if you dealt combat damage to a player this turn with a Goblin or Rogue.) When this creature enters, if its prowl cost was paid, search target opponent's library for three cards and exile them. Then that player shuffles.

name: Door of Destinies
oracleText: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, put a charge counter on this artifact. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1 for each charge counter on this artifact.
